title: ZXSpace Controls
description: Master ZXSpace's controls with smooth cannon movement, accurate positioning, and careful timing while defending your cities.
summary: Good positioning, quick reactions, and accurate aiming are the keys to surviving every wave.

sections.heading: Master the Controls
paragraphs: Drag your finger left and right to move the cannon along the bottom of the screen.
The cannon fires automatically, allowing you to focus entirely on positioning, dodging enemy fire, and protecting your cities.

sections.heading: Positioning
paragraphs: Try to stay underneath groups of invading aliens so your shots have the best chance of hitting their targets.
Avoid moving too far to one side unless you need to collect a power-up or deal with an immediate threat.
bullets: Watch how the alien formation moves.
Position yourself beneath groups of enemies.
Leave space to dodge incoming fire and collect power-ups.

sections.heading: Make the Most of Auto-Fire
paragraphs: Because the cannon fires automatically, success comes from staying in the best firing position rather than tapping the screen repeatedly.
Power-ups such as Double Laser increase your firepower, making accurate positioning even more rewarding.

images.caption: Master the controls to defend your cities and survive longer.

featureShowcases.heading: Take Control of Every Wave
featureShowcases.summary: Good positioning and quick reactions are the foundation of every successful defence.
body: Learning how the cannon moves is the first step towards mastering ZXSpace. Accurate positioning, careful movement, and good anticipation will help you destroy more aliens while keeping your cities safe.
As the waves become faster and more dangerous, strong fundamentals become even more important.
bullets: Stay ahead of the alien formation.
Collect power-ups while protecting your cities.

image.caption: Good control is the key to surviving every wave.
